## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Testing

- [ ] Frontend build: `bun run build`
- [ ] Backend check: `cargo check` from `src-tauri`
- [ ] Windows check: `bun run check:windows` when touching Windows, Tauri, audio, or transcription paths
- [ ] Linux check/build when touching Linux, Nix, Wayland/X11, clipboard, or shortcut paths

## Platform Impact

- [ ] Windows
- [ ] Linux
- [ ] macOS
- [ ] Shared core only
